author: greystroke
content:
Any thoughts on pushing for EIP-8148 in Hegotá (Add custom sweep threshold for validators) to encourage consolidation by solo validators? The desire for automatic sweeping on rewards for both liquidity and tax purposes is probably the major reason that most solo stakers haven't consolidated to 0x02. I know this was part of the original 0x02 design proposal but was dropped for a fixed 2048 ETH MaxEB for simplicity at the time. 

At the same time, is there any downside to increasing the MaxEB upper value above 2048? It unclear to me if this specific value was chosen arbitrarily or based on some specific logic.
